user_question: Pourcentage des budgets annexes (BA) présentant un excédent de fonctionnement (RF01 > DF01) en 2024.
gold_sql: SELECT (COUNT(CASE WHEN CAST(rf.value AS REAL) > CAST(df.value AS REAL) THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS pourcentage_excedent FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results rf ON d.document_id = rf.document_id AND rf.safir_field_id = 'RF01' JOIN extraction_results df ON d.document_id = df.document_id AND df.safir_field_id = 'DF01' WHERE d.budget_type = 'BA' AND d.document_year = '2024'

         d.budget_type,
         d.document_year,
         MAX(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'RF01' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) END) AS rf01,
         MAX(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'DF01' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) END) AS df01
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
  WHERE d.budget_type = 'BA' AND d.document_year = '2024'
  GROUP BY d.document_id
) sub
WHERE rf01 > df01
GROUP BY document_year, budget_type
LIMIT 1
